text.tspan: Systems to monitor the use of antimicrobials for human medicine,
The type of system used to monitor sales and usage of antibiotics and other antimicrobials, to prevent misuse and overuse
of antibiotics and slow the spread of antibiotic resistance.

g.text: National monitoring of sales and use
National monitoring of sales and use within regions of the country
Monitoring of a sample of healthcare settings

text.tspan: Data source: FAO, UNEP, WHO and WOAH (2024)
